message:
feat(async): ConnectorRuntime migration framework + ASUPERSYNC forensics schema + doctor tests

Migration framework (fcp-sdk/src/migration.rs):
- ConnectorRuntime: lifecycle wrapper for ExecutionContext creation, shutdown
  coordination, and health tracking during ASUPERSYNC migration
- RetryLoop: generic retry executor with deadline-aware exponential backoff
  and jitter using ExecutionContext
- ConnectorErrorMapping trait: consistent AsyncError → connector error conversion
- HttpRetryConfig: serializable retry configuration for HTTP connectors
- classify_http_status(): canonical HTTP status → retry decision mapping
- map_async_to_fcp_error(): canonical AsyncError → FcpError mapping
- Full migration checklist in doc comments (4 phases with acceptance gates)

OpenAI connector migration:
- client.rs: Hand-rolled retry loop replaced with RetryLoop::execute()
- error.rs: ConnectorErrorMapping impl with from_async_error/is_retryable/retry_after
- Retry config stored as HttpRetryConfig instead of raw u32/u64 fields
- ConnectorRuntime replaces direct ExecutionContext construction

ASUPERSYNC forensics schema:
- New Asupersync_Forensics_v1.schema.json with 15 required fields
- ForensicsRuleDiagnostic + ForensicsValidationError types in schemas/mod.rs
- validate_forensics_jsonl() line-by-line validation pipeline
- validate_forensics_record() with 7 deterministic rule checks:
  schema_version, slugs, positive timeout, non-empty operation,
  non-negative attempt/elapsed, outcome enum validation

Repair queue determinism (fcp-store/repair.rs):
- Queue ordering adds stable object-id tie-break after priority
- New test: queue_tie_breaks_by_object_id

Doctor tests (fcp-host/doctor.rs):
- TestRegistry mock with always_ok/always_fail/not_found/degraded builders
- Tests for overall_status_from_self_checks across all status combinations
- ConnectorSelfCheck deterministic scenarios

Dependency updates:
- fcp-graphql, fcp-oauth, fcp-webhook: workspace dep alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1877,6 +1877,7 @@ name = "fcp-graphql"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "chrono",

  "fcp-streaming",
  "fcp-testkit",
@@ -1975,6 +1976,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "async-trait",
  "base64 0.22.1",
  "chrono",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "hmac",
  "parking_lot",
@@ -1986,7 +1988,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "sha1",
  "sha2",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tracing",
  "url",
  "wiremock",
@@ -2004,13 +2005,13 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
+ "fcp-sdk",
  "fcp-testkit",
  "futures-util",
  "reqwest 0.13.2",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tokio-stream",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
@@ -2362,6 +2363,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "bytes",
  "chrono",
  "ed25519-dalek",
+ "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
  "hex",
  "hmac",
@@ -2371,7 +2373,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "sha1",
  "sha2",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tokio",
  "tracing",
  "uuid",
 ]

@@ -0,0 +1,119 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "$id": "https://flywheel.dev/schemas/asupersync-forensics-v1.schema.json",
+  "title": "ASUPERSYNC Step Forensics Record (v1)",
+  "description": "Canonical step-level forensic record schema for ASUPERSYNC migration evidence bundles.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "required": [
+    "schema_version",
+    "run_id",
+    "scenario_id",
+    "trace_id",
+    "correlation_id",
+    "connector",
+    "zone",
+    "operation",
+    "attempt",
+    "timeout_budget_ms",
+    "cancellation_reason",
+    "queue_depth",
+    "decode_budget",
+    "outcome",
+    "elapsed_ms"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "schema_version": {
+      "const": "asupersync-forensics/v1"
+    },
+    "run_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "scenario_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "trace_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "correlation_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "connector": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "zone": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "operation": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "attempt": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 1
+    },
+    "timeout_budget_ms": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0
+    },
+    "cancellation_reason": {
+      "oneOf": [
+        {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "null"
+        }
+      ]
+    },
+    "queue_depth": {
+      "oneOf": [
+        {
+          "type": "number",
+          "minimum": 0
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "null"
+        }
+      ]
+    },
+    "decode_budget": {
+      "oneOf": [
+        {
+          "type": "number",
+          "minimum": 0
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "null"
+        }
+      ]
+    },
+    "outcome": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "pass",
+        "fail",
+        "planned"
+      ]
+    },
+    "elapsed_ms": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0
+    },
+    "span_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^[0-9a-fA-F]{16}$"
+    },
+    "result_code": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    }
+  },
+  "additionalProperties": true
+}
